name: docker-ops
title: Docker Ops™
description: Docker Build, Pack & Deploy Pipeline — 3 n8n Workflow-Einheiten + ONTHERUN™ MCP Connector
author: DkZ Developer™

features.name: Docker Builder
features.description: n8n Workflow: Baut Container-Images via SSH auf VPS

features.name: Docker Pack Station
features.description: n8n Workflow: Taggt, deployed, Health-Checkt und räumt auf

features.name: Node.js Datenbank
features.description: Express.js + SQLite Audit-Trail für Builds, Packs, Deployments

features.name: ONTHERUN MCP Connector
features.description: 5 neue MCP Tools: otr_docker_build, otr_docker_pack, otr_docker_status, otr_docker_logs, otr_docker_cleanup

features.name: Dashboard UI
features.description: DkZ™ Design System v2 — 4 Tabs: Builder, Pack Station, Datenbank, Status

features.name: Docker Compose Stack
features.description: Master Compose: n8n Queue Mode + PostgreSQL + Redis + DB + ONTHERUN
